program: Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN) — CKalingaLink
notes: Starter but comprehensive curriculum map for CKalingaLink.
Includes Pre‑Nursing Pathway, Year 1–4 courses, PNLE/NCLEX blueprint mapping, RLE rotations, and sample quiz tags.
Hours are indicative; schools may vary. Customize per partner institution.
All topics include sample 'question_tags' to seed your item bank taxonomy.
Use 'blueprints' arrays to weight PNLE/NCLEX domains during mock generation.

subjects.name: Introduction to Nursing & Professional Identity
outcomes: Describe nursing roles, scopes, and settings.
Demonstrate basic therapeutic communication and professionalism.

subjects.name: Anatomy & Physiology Essentials
outcomes: Identify major body systems and basic functions.

subjects.name: Dosage Calculations & Basic Pharmacology
outcomes: Solve common dosage problems using dimensional analysis.

subjects.name: Theoretical Foundations of Nursing
outcomes: Explain major nursing theories and apply to care planning.

subjects.name: Anatomy & Physiology I
outcomes: Relate structure to function for cells, musculoskeletal, integumentary, nervous systems (part I).

subjects.name: Biochemistry for Health Sciences
outcomes: Connect biomolecules and metabolism to human physiology.

subjects.name: Fundamentals of Nursing (Theory & Skills)
outcomes: Demonstrate basic nursing skills with safety and infection control.

subjects.name: Understanding the Self
outcomes: Reflect on self and professional identity.

subjects.name: Readings in Philippine History
outcomes: Analyze primary sources related to Philippine history.

subjects.name: Physical Education 1
outcomes: Demonstrate fitness and wellness principles.

subjects.name: National Service Training Program 1
outcomes: Participate in civic activities.

subjects.name: Anatomy & Physiology II
outcomes: Explain cardiovascular, respiratory, renal, endocrine, and GI systems.

subjects.name: Microbiology & Parasitology
outcomes: Apply micro concepts to infection control and public health.

subjects.name: Health Assessment
outcomes: Perform head‑to‑toe assessment and document findings.

topics.name: Head‑to‑Toe
subtopics: CV, Resp, GI, MSK, Neuro, Skin

subjects.name: Health Education & Promotion
outcomes: Develop learner‑centered teaching plans.

subjects.name: Purposive Communication
outcomes: Communicate effectively in academic and clinical contexts.

subjects.name: Physical Education 2
outcomes: Apply exercise principles to wellness plans.

subjects.name: National Service Training Program 2
outcomes: Implement a community project.

subjects.name: Pathophysiology I
outcomes: Explain mechanisms of disease: cardio, resp, renal, endocrine.

subjects.name: Pharmacology I
outcomes: Apply pharm principles and safe med admin across systems.

subjects.name: Adult Health Nursing I (Med‑Surg I)
outcomes: Provide safe care to adult clients with common conditions; document using SBAR.

subjects.name: Maternal & Newborn Nursing
outcomes: Deliver woman‑centered care in prenatal, intrapartum, and postpartum settings.

subjects.name: Pediatric Nursing
outcomes: Provide developmentally appropriate care for infants to adolescents.

subjects.name: Psychiatric Mental Health Nursing
outcomes: Apply therapeutic communication and safe care for clients with mental health conditions.

subjects.name: Community & Public Health Nursing I
outcomes: Implement community assessment and health promotion programs.

subjects.name: Research in Nursing
outcomes: Develop a research proposal applying EBP principles.

subjects.name: Leadership & Management I
outcomes: Demonstrate basic leadership, delegation, and prioritization.

subjects.name: Adult Health Nursing II (Med‑Surg II & Critical Care)
outcomes: Manage complex adult conditions and emergencies; apply ICU safety protocols.

subjects.name: Pharmacology II (Advanced)
outcomes: Integrate advanced pharmacology in critical and specialized settings.

subjects.name: Leadership & Management II (Transition to Practice)
outcomes: Coordinate care, manage teams, and prepare for licensure transition.

subjects.name: PNLE/NCLEX Comprehensive Review & Capstone
outcomes: Synthesize knowledge through board‑style mocks, remediation, and capstone project.
